titleStmt.title: SII 34.88: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 88. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the first prākāra of the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: This relates to the assignment of certain voluntary levies on all articles of their merchandise by the merchants of the Eighteen Vishayam guild from ‘the 79 vaḷanāḍu’ for repairs to the temple of Tirukkārkōṭīśvaram at Kāmadavalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOccaṭapaṉmar tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiya tEvaṟkku
yāṇṭu 10 vatu kumpanāyaṟṟu vikkiramacōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu śrīkāmatava
lliccaruppēti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tirukkāṟkōṭīcuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyi
l tiruppaṇikku Eḻupattoṉpatu vaḷanāṭu patiṉeṇpūmi patiṉeṇ viṣaiya
ttōm rakṣayāka niṟaivuṟa niṟaintu niccayittapaṭi Aḷappaṉa niṟuppaṉa maṭippa
ṉa Uraippaṉa Eṭuppaṉa Ivaiyiṟṟukku puṭavaikkaṭṭu Oṉṟukku paṇam kālum miḷaku poti Oṉṟukku paṇam kālum pākku poti Oṉṟukku paṇam kālum Uraippaṉa
poṉ Oṉṟukku paṇam kālum niṟaikku kācu Oṉṟum Aricippoti Oṉṟukkuk kācu Ira
ṇṭum nel poti Oṉṟukku kācu Oṉṟu talaiccumaikku kācu Oṉṟum Ivaiyi
ṟṟā varuvaṉavum vāṅkikoṇṭu Ittiruppaṇi cantirātittavarai cellak kaṭavatāka
patiṉeṇ viṣayattār Ellāruṅ kūṭi cammatittukkuṭuttōm Ippaṭipaṇi
yāl nakar kaṇakku Aññūṟṟuva vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku malai maṇṭalamātākkaḷ
Eḻuttu Inta patiṉeṇ viṣaiyattār nāṅkaḷ niyamittapaṭiyē tiruppaṇikkāriyamāka Eḻu
tavēṇum Eṉṟu vēṇṭikkoḷḷa Eḻutiṉēṉ Imaiyavappatta curakuru nāṭṭu kayillāya kiḻavaṉāṉa Eyilkulattu
purattaracaṉ pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu Eyilnāṭṭu pūtamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ namaccivāya tēvaṉ ....
Digital edition of SII 34.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
